plugins.prepareCmd: for p in Contracts Client Server SignalR Testing Testing.Integration Aspire ServiceDefaults DomainService Admin.Abstractions Admin.Cli Admin.Server; do dotnet pack "src/Hexalith.EventStore.$p/Hexalith.EventStore.$p.csproj" --configuration Release --output ./nupkgs -p:Version=${nextRelease.version} -p:GeneratePackageOnBuild=false -p:UseHexalithProjectReferences=false || exit 1; done
